must_do.full_text:
Christopher Nolan's $250 million movie depends on one building in Burbank, 41 theaters worldwide, and roughly 90 people on Earth who know how to run the projector.

The Odyssey is the first feature shot entirely on IMAX film, and FotoKem is the last lab anywhere that can make the
must_do.summary: Christopher Nolan的2.5亿美元电影《Odyssey》首次全片采用IMAX胶片拍摄，仅一家实验室能制作。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：first feature shot entirely on IMAX film
反常识/意外性：全球仅一家实验室能处理
angles: Nolan新作首次全片IMAX胶片拍摄，全球仅一家实验室能制作

电影工业的绝唱：最后的IMAX胶片实验室

must_do.full_text:
Germany has launched one of the world's best open-source AI models.

Soofi S, made by the Soofi consortium, is a 30B parameter model fully trained in Europe and tops the ranking for open-source AI.

Huge moment for Europe, and finally some competition for Chinese open-source AI. https://t.co/UGArJkoE4e
must_do.summary: 德国推出开源AI模型Soofi S：30B参数，完全在欧洲训练，排名领先开源AI。欧洲AI竞争力提升，对标中国开源模型。
angles: 欧洲开源AI反击：德国Soofi S 30B模型登顶
终于！欧洲推出能打的开源大模型，对标中国
Soofi S来了：德国30B参数开源模型挑战全球格局

must_do.full_text:
Cyclist Willie Smit was disqualified from a race in China for wearing AI-enabled smart glasses that recorded video while he competed

He argued Tour de France riders are allowed to film themselves without being penalized https://t.co/0H1oWHV5Uf
must_do.summary: 自行车手Willie Smit因穿戴AI智能眼镜录制比赛视频被中国赛事禁赛，但环法自行车赛允许类似行为。

must_do.full_text:
Apple just sued OpenAI for trade secret theft in a 41 page federal complaint. The two companies were partners a year and a half ago and now they're in an all-out legal war over the post-smartphone device future.
How quickly do the tables turn.
must_do.summary: 苹果起诉OpenAI窃取商业机密，41页联邦诉状，两家曾是合作伙伴，如今为后智能手机设备未来展开全面法律战。

Available on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans. Not available on publicly-shared artifacts. https://t.co/FcvtiOqv0J

An internal automated red teamer on a mission to find our models’ prompt injection vulnerabilities at scale, helping us build stronger defenses before wider deployment.

must_do.full_text:
I'm 33 and I think Claude Code is melting my brain.

For 6 months straight I've had 5-6 terminals open at once, waiting on responses just to smash "enter" 90% of the time. That's the whole job now.

And it's doing something to me. A few friends and I keep circling back to the
must_do.summary: 开发者分享：33岁的他用Claude Code 6个月，工作流变成开5-6个终端等待回复后按Enter。反映AI编程工具对工作方式的深刻改变。
angles: Claude Code正在改变程序员的工作方式，从思考者变成验证者

priority.full_text:
辛い時は誰かに相談しましょう
⬆️
学校も親もカウンセラーも誰も信じれなくなった結果、“誰か”がチャッピー（chatGPT）やzetaの時代になった。
priority.summary: 日文推文：当感到痛苦时要找人倾诉，但学校、父母、心理咨询师都不可信的结果是，"某人"变成了ChatGPT或Zeta的时代。AI心理健康应用观点。

priority.full_text:
One thing I hate about Claude/gemini/chatgpt with memory turned on is that it heavily over indexes on the stuff it knows about me. 

It’s liken having an awkward coworker that you talked to once about deadlifting and then every time you see them they just keep brining that up.
priority.summary: 用户吐槽：Claude/Gemini/ChatGPT的记忆功能过度索引用户信息，像尴尬同事总是重复提起你说过的话题。AI产品体验观点，缺乏具体新闻钩子。
angles: AI记忆功能的尴尬真相：它比你想象的更了解你
Claude/ChatGPT记忆功能槽点大盘点
为什么AI的记忆功能让人感到不适

backup.full_text: Something I have been thinking about: in the past, the best engineers I knew spent a lot of time automating their work in various ways. Better vim/emacs automations, writing lint rules to catch repeat code issues, building up a suite of e2e tests so they don't need to smoke test
backup.summary: 资深工程师分享职业观点：最优秀的工程师通过自动化vim/emacs、编写lint规则、构建e2e测试来提升效率。
angles: 顶级工程师的自动化秘诀：vim/lint/e2e测试三板斧
效率黑客养成：从自动化工具到工程师竞争力

backup.full_text:
Pro tip: when prompting Codex with really difficult /goals, ask it to "write a goal for another thread to achieve this and babysit it until it figures it out"

By doing so, you'll add built-in steering and another layer of taste verification (that's how this video was made)
backup.summary: 分享Codex提示词技巧：用多线程目标设置实现自我验证。开发者向教程，受众垂直。
angles: Codex高级用法：多线程自验证提示词技巧
